response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON contains no vocal music, which is correct as the video is entirely dialogue and background music. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was utilized for scene descriptions, but the transcription and timing was done manually to capture all spoken dialogue accurately. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue strictly to character vocalizations. Subtitle divisions are made logically to prevent text overlap and cascading delays.
